title: cft token spec
description: One Cloudflare API token managed by cft. A file may contain multiple documents separated by '---'; the schema applies to each document.

name.description: Token name. DNS-1123 label: lowercase alphanumeric or '-', starts and ends alphanumeric, at most 63 characters. Must be unique across all specs.

policies.description: Access policies attached to the token. At least one is required.

expires.description: Expiry as an RFC3339 timestamp or a YYYY-MM-DD date.

permissions.description: Cloudflare permission group names, e.g. "DNS Write".

zone.description: Zone name the policy applies to. Exactly one of zone, account, user must be set.

account.description: Account name or ID the policy applies to. Exactly one of zone, account, user must be set.

user.description: Set to true to scope the policy to user-level resources. Exactly one of zone, account, user must be set.

effect.description: Whether the policy allows or denies the listed permissions. Defaults to allow.
